title: CT15.decide.ledgerCapacity automation-first node contract
description: An exact projection of the compiled predecessor-indexed Lean node, including its proof-instance boundary and framework-generated outputs.

presentation.summary: Compiled decision node with an explicit automation contract.
presentation.label: CT15.decide.ledgerCapacity

outgoingEdges.constructorType:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT15.Spec P} →
    {capability : CT15.Capability S} →
      {input : CT15.Input P} →
        {rank : CT15.RankState S capability input} →
          {full : CT15.FullRankState S capability input rank} →
            {ledger : CT15.LedgerState S capability input full} →
              CT15.C4Certificate S capability input ledger →
                CT15.Graph.Edge S capability input CT15.Graph.NodeId.ledgerComparison CT15.Graph.NodeId.c4Terminal

{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT15.Spec P} →
    {capability : CT15.Capability S} →
      {input : CT15.Input P} →
        {rank : CT15.RankState S capability input} →
          {full : CT15.FullRankState S capability input rank} →
            {ledger : CT15.LedgerState S capability input full} →
              CT15.FullRankLedgerResidual S capability input ledger →
                CT15.Graph.Edge S capability input CT15.Graph.NodeId.ledgerComparison
                  CT15.Graph.NodeId.fullRankLedgerTerminal
